features.description: Autoresearch scoring harness: composite score from proof files and pnl.db
steps: Verify output shows composite_score, sharpe_ratio, max_drawdown_pct, turnover_rate, total_trades, win_rate, total_pnl, feature_count
features.notes: Created scripts/autoresearch_scorer.py. Score formula: composite = sharpe_ratio - (max_drawdown_pct * 2.0) - (turnover_rate * 0.5) + (simplicity_bonus * 0.3). Reads proof files for active features (kalshi, stock_hunter, sef, crypto_spot, gdelt) and pnl.db for trade history. Computes Sharpe from equity curve, max drawdown from equity snapshots, turnover from trade timestamps. features.description: Bootstrap trade validator: 10K resampling to statistically validate trading edge (win rate, Sharpe CI, p-value)
steps: crontab -l | grep bootstrap (verify cron entry present)
features.notes: Created scripts/bootstrap_validator.py. Loads trades from SQLite pnl.db (EXIT actions, tries first) or falls back to proof JSON files. Runs 10,000 bootstrap resamples computing 95% CI for win_rate, mean_pnl, Sharpe ratio. Verdict logic FIXED 2026-03-20: now uses Expected Value (mean_pnl) not win rate. EDGE_CONFIRMED: p_value_not_profitable < 0.05 AND ci_95_mean_pnl[0] > 0. MARGINAL_EDGE: p<0.10 AND mean_pnl>0 but CI includes zero. INSUFFICIENT_DATA: <30 trades. NO_EDGE: otherwise. Strategy classified as asymmetric_payoff (payoff_ratio=11.9:1, win_rate=16.8%, breakeven=7.7%). After shadow resolver backfill (452 trades): EDGE_CONFIRMED (p=0.0000, CI [$0.17, $0.43]/trade, Sharpe 2.18-4.38). Cron: 0 6 * * 0 (Sundays 6am UTC).
